recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Central America
recent.evidence: The listed cyclones (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA, NOUL) were all tropical storms outside Central America with zero Category 1+ impact, so no Category 2 hurricane landfall in Central America is shown.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand will exceed 95 GWh/h due to extreme heat
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports Texas electricity demand exceeding 95 GWh/h during the window, so the threshold event is not shown to have occurred.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop below 1 per day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict activity
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily transits, which is not below the forecast threshold of 1 per day.

recent.statement: A Category 1 hurricane will make landfall in Honduras within the next week.
recent.evidence: None of the tropical cyclone signals show a Category 1 hurricane landfall in Honduras, and no signal is located near Honduras with the required wind speeds.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the entire state of Florida
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows a severe thunderstorm warning covering the entire state of Florida, an event that would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A heatwave will hit the Texas power grid within the next 24 hours, leading to a 10% increase in electricity demand
recent.evidence: The window has closed and no numbered signal provides any text showing a Texas heatwave or a 10% electricity demand increase occurred.

recent.statement: NG=F will close 3% higher than today's price
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F (natural gas futures) price movement; the energy signals cover only WTI and Brent crude oil, so nothing shows natural gas closing 3% higher.

recent.statement: There will be a significant earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands within the next week.
recent.evidence: No numbered signal contains text showing a significant earthquake occurred in the South Sandwich Islands during the window, though such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: Protests will erupt in Paris over proposed pension reforms, leading to widespread civil unrest
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows protests or civil unrest occurring in Paris over pension reforms during the window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 5.0 earthquake will strike the southern coast of Chile
recent.evidence: No captured signal documents any magnitude 5.0 earthquake striking the southern coast of Chile within the window, though such an event would likely have been recorded.

recent.statement: The price of Brent crude oil will rise above $80/barrel
recent.evidence: S10 shows Brent Crude at $100.18/barrel, well above the $80 threshold.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike the South Island of New Zealand
recent.evidence: No signal was captured, and a major earthquake striking the South Island would certainly have been recorded within the window.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
